Sentence: After cleaning out the poker table with a legendary run of cards, Julian celebrated by ordering the rarest Wagyu ribeye at the steakhouse.
The neon lights of the slot machine flashed wildly as it hit the jackpot, causing Sarah to immediately scream in excitement and hug the nearest stranger.
They spent their afternoon bartering their VIP show tickets just to secure one of the last available penthouse hotel rooms for the weekend.
Arthur spent a grueling four hours losing balls on the golf course, but completely forgot his frustration the moment his deep-tissue massage began at the spa.
After filling three separate plates at the midnight buffet, Leo crawled straight into one of the fluffiest hotel rooms beds he’d ever felt and immediately fell asleep.
An afternoon of pure bliss at the spa left her perfectly rejuvenated and ready for a dazzling night out with front-row show tickets.
Elena swore she’d only play the slot machine for twenty minutes, but before she knew it, the dinner bell was ringing at the buffet.
He nervously ate his steakhouse meal to-go, trying to keep a poker face while holding a winning hand of cards.
Their friendly wager on the 18th hole of the golf course determined exactly who was footing the massive bill at the steakhouse that evening.
Their hotel room keycards were barely used all weekend, as they spent nearly every waking hour glued to a lucky slot machine downstairs.
Between intense rounds of blackjack cards, the crew made tactical pitstops at the all-you-can-eat buffet to refuel.
She lost her show tickets somewhere while playing cards and had to desperately beg the concierge desk for a replacement.
